hooks.command: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; INPUT=$(cat); CMD=""; if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then CMD=$(printf "%s" "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null) || CMD=""; fi; if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then CMD=$(printf "%s" "$INPUT" | sed -n '"'"'s/.*"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\(.*\)".*/\1/p'"'"' | head -1); fi; if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then echo "{}"; exit 0; fi; NEEDS_PREFLIGHT=0; STRIPPED=$(printf "%s" "$CMD" | sed '"'"'s/^[A-Z_]*=[^ ]* *//g'"'"'); case "$STRIPPED" in git\ commit*|git\ merge\ --no-ff*|git\ push*) NEEDS_PREFLIGHT=1 ;; esac; if [ "$NEEDS_PREFLIGHT" -eq 1 ]; then printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"PREFLIGHT REQUIRED: Before proceeding with this git operation, run /preflight to verify the staged changes. Do not continue until /preflight passes with zero findings.\"}}"; else echo "{}"; fi'

bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; PATTERNS=0; DEPRECATED=0; PHANTOMS=0; if [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -d "$ROOT/data" ]; then if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then PATTERNS=$(jq ".patterns | length" "$ROOT/data/ai-failure-patterns.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); DEPRECATED=$(jq ".apis | length" "$ROOT/data/deprecated-apis.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); PHANTOMS=$(jq ".packages | length" "$ROOT/data/phantom-packages.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); else PATTERNS=$(grep -c '"pattern"' "$ROOT/data/ai-failure-patterns.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); DEPRECATED=$(grep -c '"api"' "$ROOT/data/deprecated-apis.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); PHANTOMS=$(grep -c '"package"' "$ROOT/data/phantom-packages.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); fi; fi; DISMISSED=0; DATA="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA:-}"; if [ -n "$DATA" ] && [ -f "$DATA/dismissed-findings.json" ]; then if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then DISMISSED=$(jq ". | length" "$DATA/dismissed-findings.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); else DISMISSED=$(grep -c '"id"' "$DATA/dismissed-findings.json" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); fi; fi; printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"Preflight plugin active. Pattern database: %s failure patterns, %s deprecated APIs, %s phantom packages. Dismissed findings: %s. Run /preflight before committing.\"}}" "$PATTERNS" "$DEPRECATED" "$PHANTOMS" "$DISMISSED"'
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Preflight plugin is active. Remember: run /preflight before any git commit, merge, or push."}}'

bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; DATA="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA:-}"; if [ -z "$DATA" ]; then echo "{}"; exit 0; fi; mkdir -p "$DATA"; STATS_FILE="$DATA/session-stats.json"; INPUT=$(cat); SESSION_ID=""; if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then SESSION_ID=$(printf "%s" "$INPUT" | jq -r ".session_id // empty" 2>/dev/null) || SESSION_ID=""; fi; if [ -z "$SESSION_ID" ]; then SESSION_ID="unknown"; fi; TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" 2>/dev/null || date +"%Y-%m-%d" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); ENTRY=$(printf "{\"session_id\":\"%s\",\"ended_at\":\"%s\"}" "$SESSION_ID" "$TIMESTAMP"); if [ -f "$STATS_FILE" ]; then if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq --argjson entry "$ENTRY" ". += [$entry]" "$STATS_FILE" > "$STATS_FILE.tmp" && mv "$STATS_FILE.tmp" "$STATS_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "[$ENTRY]" > "$STATS_FILE"; else EXISTING=$(cat "$STATS_FILE"); printf "%s" "$EXISTING" | sed "s/]$/,$ENTRY]/" > "$STATS_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "[$ENTRY]" > "$STATS_FILE"; fi; else echo "[$ENTRY]" > "$STATS_FILE"; fi; echo "{}"'
